mapper.select: SELECT application_id, user_id, shelter_name, address, contact_info, status, applied_at FROM shelterapplication
SELECT application_id, user_id, shelter_name, address, contact_info, status, applied_at FROM shelterapplication WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shelterapplication (user_id, shelter_name, address, contact_info, status, applied_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{shelterName}, #{address}, #{contactInfo}, '待审核', NOW())
